visual_description: A woman in a denim jacket and light pants stands beside a man in a black jacket and jeans inside a shop, while a man in black walks past them from left to right. The scene then shifts to a close‑up of a man in a dark shirt with an earring, his face lit against a dark background as he looks ahead and moves his mouth. The background behind him remains dim and indistinct.
